nasb.text: “When he finishes atoning for the holy place and the tent of meeting and the altar, he shall offer the live goat.

esv.text: “And when he has made an end of atoning for the Holy Place and the tent of meeting and the altar, he shall present the live goat.

cnv.text: “亞倫為聖所、會幕和祭壇贖了罪以後，就要把那隻活山羊獻上。

ccb.text: “他为至圣所、会幕和祭坛赎罪后，要牵来那只活山羊，
